name: HealthChip
description: One broker-health chip: state dot (outline ok / filled warning / filled error), label, monospaced value, and a one-word qualifier. State is never colour-only; informational chips carry no dot; a stale chip keeps its value but drops the dot and qualifier.

props.name: level
props.description: 'ok' | 'attention' | 'problem', or null for an informational chip with no dot.

props.name: informational
props.description: Value-only chip (heap, churn) with no state dot.

props.name: qualifier
props.description: One-word text qualifier shown beside the value; '' hides it.

props.name: valueText
props.description: Preformatted monospaced value (units and any peak already composed by the caller).

props.name: stale
props.description: Source silent past the stale threshold: greys the value and drops the dot and qualifier.

notes: Figma is not linked yet. Value formatting per chip lives in HealthStrip; this component is purely presentational.
